title: PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT - 211info
text: TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated intensive therapeutic services and education including medication management, skills training, academic instruction, individual and family therapy, as well as 24/7 crisis response for families. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-18 who have behavioral and/or mental health condition that interfere with their ability to learn in a school environment Hours: Normal school hours with an extended calendar Email (503) 813-7760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 813-7760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: OHP members must be referred by their Family Care coordinator, wraparound coordinator, or other OHP representative. Call the Access Department for more information or to make a referral. FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Psychiatric Day Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - SUBACUTE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES
